prompt: Study Codex CLI transcript for recent architecture changes
note: Reviewed the 4,297-line Codex CLI transcript and correlated its design decisions, implementation iterations, Npcap ARP debugging, FWD/ETHERNET ownership rule, and VVRP/CMD three-stage decoupling with commits d6865ab and b9e1b90
decisions: Treat FWD as a thin media dispatcher that must never parse or construct Ethernet frames
Treat VVRP as the process and runtime owner; CMD is only an in-process operator shell module
Do not preserve standalone CMD/legacy CCmd launch compatibility
